summary: Excellent soundboard capture of a gentle, precise show highlighted by a beautiful Comes A Time → Sailor → Saint opening.
review: The recording offers crystal‑clear soundboard audio for the acoustic and second electric sets, delivering a pristine listening experience. Musically the concert is praised for Jerry Garcia’s delicate, “new” guitar tone and a standout sequence that flows from Comes A Time into Sailor and Saint, with Terrapin Station’s crescendos adding extra sparkle. Listeners note the precision and fluidity of the performance despite the first electric set being unavailable.

ai_rating.rationale: Two 5‑star reviews praise both sound quality and musical highlights, while a single 3‑star review offers moderate criticism of style only; overall the show is strong and the recording excellent.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Soundboard source for acoustic set and second electric set; clear, detailed mix with no noticeable drop‑outs. First electric set not present in this release.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Acoustic portion is fun and standard; the second electric set opens with a beautiful drum intro into Comes A Time, then flows smoothly into Sailor and Saint, creating a memorable and precise opening that sets the tone for the rest of the show.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Described as having his “new” guitar dialed in, delivering watery, delicate touches and understated solos that give the set a gentle, precise feel.
band_member_comments.Drums: Opening drum intro into Comes A Time is highlighted as beautiful and perfectly segues into the song.
